{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Bey Herrn Daniel Haag dem Buchbinder sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><TITLE>Steiners Fest-Gedancken</TITLE> in <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>2. fl. 24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Neues und vollkommenes Gebettbuch</TITLE> in <FORMAT>groß 8v°.</FORMAT> von <AUTHOR>Pfarrer Stehelin</AUTHOR> in <PLACE>St. Gallen</PLACE>, ohngebunden <PRIZE>46. kr.</PRIZE>; gebunden in Leder und Schlotz à <PRIZE>fl. 1. 10. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Memoires de Rochester</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8v°.</FORMAT> ohngebunden à <PRIZE>6. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Anfäng der Geographie</TITLE> <FORMAT>8v°.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>6. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Messung des Meridians Gradus</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8v°.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>12. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Satura pars II.</TITLE> <FORMAT>8v°.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>18. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Gespräch von den Würmen welche bey Anfang dieses Jahrs auf dem Schnee gefunden worden</TITLE> à <PRIZE>8. Rappen,</PRIZE> und viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bey Ihme zu vernemmen.</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":9,"explanation":"
1. **Unclosed/nested BIBL tag for "Memoires de Rochester"**: The original XML had an unclosed `<BIBL>` tag for "Memoires de Rochester" which incorrectly nested the subsequent `<BIBL>` entries inside it. The closing `</BIBL>` was added after the prize for "Memoires de Rochester", and all subsequent `<BIBL>` entries were made siblings instead of children.

2. **Unicode escape `\u221a\u00fc` → `ß`**: The garbled encoding `\u221a\u00fc` (appearing as `√ü`) was corrected to `ß` (e.g., in `groß`).

3. **Unicode escape `\u221a\u2264` → `°`**: The garbled encoding `\u221a\u2264` (appearing as `√≤`) was corrected to `°` (e.g., in `8v°.`).

4. **Unicode escape `\u221a\u2020` → `à`**: The garbled encoding `\u221a\u2020` (appearing as `√†`) was corrected to `à` (the French preposition meaning "at/for", used in price contexts).

5. **Unicode escape `\u221a\u00a7` → `ä`**: The garbled encoding `\u221a\u00a7` (appearing as `√§`) was corrected to `ä` (e.g., in `Anfäng` and `Gespräch`).

6. **Unicode escape `\u221a\u00bar` → `ü`**: The garbled encoding `\u221a\u00bar` (appearing as `√º`) was corrected to `ü` (e.g., in `Würmen`).

7. **`<PRICE>` → `<PRIZE>`**: The tag `<PRICE>` (and `</PRICE>`) in the "Messung des Meridians Gradus" entry was corrected to `<PRIZE>` / `</PRIZE>` to be consistent with all other price tags in the document.

8. **Corrected `Anfäng`**: The word `Anfäng` (from garbled `Anf\u221a\u00a7ng`) was decoded; note this appears to be a historical/archaic spelling and is preserved as-is from the source.

9. **Structural fix of nested BIBLs**: All `<BIBL>` elements are now properly closed and at the same level (siblings), resolving the structural nesting error caused by the missing closing tag on "Memoires de Rochester".
"}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>Bey Herrn Daniel Haag dem Buchbinder sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><TITLE>Steiners Fest-Gedancken</TITLE> in <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>2. fl. 24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Neues und vollkommenes Gebettbuch</TITLE> in <FORMAT>groß 8v°.</FORMAT> von <AUTHOR>Pfarrer Stehelin</AUTHOR> in <PLACE>St. Gallen</PLACE>, ohngebunden <PRIZE>46. kr.</PRIZE>; gebunden in Leder und Schlotz à <PRIZE>fl. 1. 10. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Memoires de Rochester</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8v°.</FORMAT> ohngebunden à <PRIZE>6. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Anfäng der Geographie</TITLE> <FORMAT>8v°.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>6. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Messung des Meridians Gradus</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8v°.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>12. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Satura pars II.</TITLE> <FORMAT>8v°.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>18. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Gespräch von den Würmen welche bey Anfang dieses Jahrs auf dem Schnee gefunden worden</TITLE> à <PRIZE>8. Rappen,</PRIZE> und viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bey Ihme zu vernemmen.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. **Unclosed/nested BIBL tag for "Memoires de Rochester"**: The original XML had an unclosed `<BIBL>` tag for "Memoires de Rochester" which incorrectly nested the subsequent `<BIBL>` entries inside it. The closing `</BIBL>` was added after the prize for "Memoires de Rochester", and all subsequent `<BIBL>` entries were made siblings instead of children.

2. **Unicode escape `\u221a\u00fc` → `ß`**: The garbled encoding `\u221a\u00fc` (appearing as `√ü`) was corrected to `ß` (e.g., in `groß`).

3. **Unicode escape `\u221a\u2264` → `°`**: The garbled encoding `\u221a\u2264` (appearing as `√≤`) was corrected to `°` (e.g., in `8v°.`).

4. **Unicode escape `\u221a\u2020` → `à`**: The garbled encoding `\u221a\u2020` (appearing as `√†`) was corrected to `à` (the French preposition meaning "at/for", used in price contexts).

5. **Unicode escape `\u221a\u00a7` → `ä`**: The garbled encoding `\u221a\u00a7` (appearing as `√§`) was corrected to `ä` (e.g., in `Anfäng` and `Gespräch`).

6. **Unicode escape `\u221a\u00bar` → `ü`**: The garbled encoding `\u221a\u00bar` (appearing as `√º`) was corrected to `ü` (e.g., in `Würmen`).

7. **`<PRICE>` → `<PRIZE>`**: The tag `<PRICE>` (and `</PRICE>`) in the "Messung des Meridians Gradus" entry was corrected to `<PRIZE>` / `</PRIZE>` to be consistent with all other price tags in the document.

8. **Corrected `Anfäng`**: The word `Anfäng` (from garbled `Anf\u221a\u00a7ng`) was decoded; note this appears to be a historical/archaic spelling and is preserved as-is from the source.

9. **Structural fix of nested BIBLs**: All `<BIBL>` elements are now properly closed and at the same level (siblings), resolving the structural nesting error caused by the missing closing tag on "Memoires de Rochester".
